reviews.author: Anonymous
reviews.review_body: The school holds a strong academic reputation in the area and has consistently delivered better results than even the branded schools nearby. The campus is slightly older but it is equipped with all the latest equipment and tech for modern learning including smart panels and air conditioning. The teachers are very knowledgeable and caring, and the campus overall has a warm, positive atmosphere

reviews.author: Shilpi Sethi
reviews.review_body:
Awesome school. Very cooperative teachers. Teaching new things to kids. Learning is very nice. Excellent teachers.
Thanks.

reviews.author: Tishh
reviews.review_body: Well! the school is really good. My daughter has been studying in this school from past 6 years and now she is in 11th standard. When I told her to change the school, she simply said NO and now she is happy here.

reviews.author: bhupender kumar
reviews.review_body: One of the best school in the area I terms of academics, junior wing happy hours also the part of this organization. Only minus is not a big playground and school bus service you have to be dependent upon private service providers.

reviews.author: Bhàg yt
reviews.review_body:
School is an important institution in our society that plays a significant role in shaping individuals' lives and preparing them for their future endeavors. Here are some praises for school:

Education: Schools provide access to education, which is essential for the development of individuals and society as a whole. Education empowers individuals with knowledge and skills necessary for success in life.

Socialization: Schools provide a platform for socialization, where students from diverse backgrounds interact, share experiences, and learn from each other. It also helps students develop social skills and values such as cooperation, respect, and teamwork.

Career opportunities: Schools provide career opportunities and guidance for students to explore different career paths, which helps in making informed career choices and shaping their future.

reviews.author: vaibhav
reviews.review_body: A school where teachers are there who care, and my daughter actually likes to learn at KIIT WORLD SCHOOL. Wonderful with special needs. Catered to the needs of your child. More affordable than other private schools. Go check them out!
